content: Selling hacked payroll database with employee emails, leaked data and password reset tokens. Fresh dump from a finance target.
Ransomware affiliate looking for malware loaders and exploit brokers for healthcare intrusion operations.
Offering access to compromised admin panel credentials. Includes two-factor bypass notes and persistence scripts.
Marketplace chatter about leaked customer records. Mentions credential stuffing campaign and reused passwords.
General hosting discussion with no criminal indicators beyond infrastructure pricing and uptime feedback.
